---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for SideQuest
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve, or what would it make better? Who benefits (person,
business, influencer)?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you thought about.

## Scope & impact

- Area: [ ] map/events  [ ] friends/chat  [ ] discover  [ ] business/team  [ ] other
- Does it need a DB migration? [ ] yes  [ ] no
- Does it affect dark‑mode UI? [ ] yes  [ ] no

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or references.
